title: フェブラリーSの後に・ツギツギ

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: It's just like you said! One race down!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Good luck at the next one! I'll be watching!

Things are off to a great start, and the crowd is
certainly pleased. But as for Smart Falcon
herself...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Looks like our next race is the Teio Sho in June!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
2,000 meters... It's a little on the long side, so we
need a strategy, stat!

Smart Falcon is not exactly wild with excitement,
despite securing a fantastic first win.

Instead, she's already looking ahead, eyeing her
next win.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yoohoo, you okay? Come on, let's head back to
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Quick as lightning! ☆ In a flash! ♪

She's at least acting like her usual self, so I can't
bring myself to say anything to her. For now, I
switch gears to focus on the Teio Sho.
